I just ordered yesterday, is it too late to add my free chain to my order?

Gijotoole@gmail.com

GLD: You're welcome. I'll keep you posted.

GLD: Sorry, but the free chain is added automatically, and you won't be able to select the style.
Well, shucks. I just clicked on that link and saw that it's added automatically. In the email, it says the offer expires 30 days after receipt. It can't be added manually?
GLD: I'm still waiting to hear back from the team though rest assured I'll shoot you a text as soon as I have an update! Appreciate your patience!
I appreciate you looking out for me. Thanks again!

I saw that my order hasn't shipped yet, but a more recent order has. Was I able to get the free chain added to my order after all?

GLD: Thanks for following up! I'm sorry, but I'm afraid I'm still waiting to hear back from my team for an answer. No worries, rest assured I'll text you as soon as I have an update. Hang tight!

Also, I see that Order #3728090 did include a free 20" Rope Chain (4mm). Is this the free chain you were hoping for?
It is, but, selfishly, I was hoping for another one with two orders 😬
GLD: Thanks for letting me know. Please hang tight while I wait to hear from my team regarding this.
Is GLD holding this order to see if I can get a free chain? I don't want the free chain badly enough to keep delaying shipment, if that's why it's taking longer to get moving.

GLD: I'm sorry, I'm afraid I have limited information about this but the team should be able to provide an answer. I'm still waiting for their response, but rest assured I will update you once I hear back from them. Thank you for your patience and understanding.
Do you know why it's taking so long to ship? My other order shipped in a couple of days. I might just cancel this order and start over.

GLD: I apologize for the delay! We process orders in 1-2 business days and usually ship via USPS, UPS or FedEx. Once shipped it will take 5-10 business days domestically. We also offer expedited shipping at checkout, if needed. Please note that solid gold/custom pieces need 4-8 weeks to complete before shipping. We understand this isn't a short amount of time, with that being said, our quality and guarantees are unmatched. You'll receive tracking info via email as soon as it ships. Please check your spam and promo folders as sometimes our emails end up there. Let me know if this clears things up, I'll be here if you have any other questions.

Ok, thanks. The website said it ships immediately. I understand it's not actually immediately, but I paid for the express shipping, and it hasn't even been shipped out yet. Are they backordered? I can cancel the order and maybe order again some other time when you have the chains in stock. My other order was a day later than my first and it'll arrive at my house tomorrow.
GLD: I'm really sorry about this and surely, this isn't the experience I want you to have. Let me pass this along to my team to double-check as well and I'll reach out once I have more info.
Thank you
GLD: You're welcome! While waiting for my team's response, is there anything else I can help you with?

GLD: Thanks for your patience! I just heard from the team and we understand how important this is. We can create a new order for the free chain, which is a 4mm Rope Chain in White Gold, 20". However, please note that if you decide to return the original order for any reason, the free chain must also be returned as part of the process.
 
Let me know if you'd like us to proceed with creating the order for the free chain. We're here to help with any further questions or concerns you may have!
That sounds great. Do I need to cancel the current order, or will you cancel and start a new one?
GLD: You don't need to cancel the order. We will create an order for you specifically for the free chain. Let me know if there's anything else I can help you with.
Nope. Thanks for the help! Do you know when my original order will ship out? I'm tryna look Gucci when I go out!
GLD: You're welcome! Order #3728090 is already on its way to you. You can track it here: https://gld.attn.tv/ai4b7xvh_zZg

GLD: As luck would have it, we can go ALL WEEK LONG!

Did order 3726217 ship today? I didn't get any notification other than "order received" and it's been three days.

GLD: My apologies for the wait. Upon checking your order #3726217, it's still being processed. We typically process orders within 1-2 business days (excluding Saturdays and Sundays), and once shipped, it will take 5-10 business days for domestic delivery via USPS, UPS, or FedEx. I recommend giving it a little more time. You'll receive tracking information via email as soon as it ships. Please be sure to check your spam and promo folders, as sometimes our emails can end up there. Thank you for your patience on this.
My concern is that I placed this order on Sunday, and it still hasn't shipped, whereas the order I placed on Monday will arrive tomorrow.

GLD: I understand the urgency. Please note that our processing time typically takes 1-2 business days, excluding Saturdays and Sundays. I kindly ask for a bit more time, and if you still haven't seen an update in the upcoming days, feel free to follow up. I'd be happy to check this again with my team for you.

Ok. I hope you understand my concern. If I don't have an update or it doesn't ship tomorrow, I'll feel more comfortable canceling my order and reordering. I know the team over there has done some work to get me a free 4mm rope chain, but I'm becoming uncomfortable with the long delay. I appreciate the help. Have a great day!
GLD: I understand your concern, and I'm sorry for the slow reply. Feel free to reach out if there's anything I can help with. Have a great day!

Shop our latest drops. No Bots. No Raffles. Just 30% off.

Yes.
Gijotoole@gmail.com
GLD: Thanks for sharing that with me. I'll forward this to my team and get in touch as soon as I have an update.

GLD: Thanks for your patience! I just heard from the team, and we understand how important this is. It seems an item on your order previously went out of stock as your order was processing. However, we have now replenished our inventory, we went ahead and created the replacement order for you. Your new Order Number is #3726217A and you will receive an email confirmation with the details.
 
Once it is shipped out, you will receive an additional email with the shipping information along with the tracking number. If you have any further questions, please let me know.
Thank you for the update!
I just tried my bracelet from order 3728090, and it's too small. How do I exchange it for a longer necklace?

GLD: I'm happy to help with an exchange! If your bracelet is in brand-new condition, you can return it within 14 days of receiving it. You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://gld.attn.tv/af2GC2muFXfC

You can start your return here: https://gld.attn.tv/aB9e-esdGoZY If you have any more questions, feel free to shoot me a text.
Do I need to send the bracelet back in it's box ir can I pad it and send it back in an envelope? The box is breaking through the envelope it came in.
GLD: The original packaging isn't required. Just ensure the item is well-protected. We can't honor returns damaged in transit.
Thanks
I just ordered a new bracelet and then got a better discount coupon. Can I cancel order #3734294?
GLD: Let me check on this again with my team. It's a little late so it's likely I won't hear back by today, though rest assured I'll reach out once business hours resume.
Thank you
GLD: You're welcome. I'll be in touch.
I purchased a bracelet yesterday and it's already shipped, but the 22" miami cuban still hasn't shipped. Please cancel the 22" Miami cuban in white gold. I don't want to deal with this anymore.

GLD: Thank you for letting me know. I'm sorry to hear that the Miami Cuban link chain, still hasn't shipped. 
Can you please confirm the order number for that item? I'll send your request to my team.
I really appreciate the help. I'm not sure why the 22" cuban is having issues shipping, but I'd like to purchase a different chain.
GLD: Thanks for providing the order number! I checked, and Order #3726217 has already been marked as canceled. If you have any more questions, feel free to shoot me a text.
The order # is 3726217A
The "A" was added by GLD when the order failed to ship last time
GLD: I see, sorry about that! I'm checking it with my team already. I'll keep you posted.
I can't cancel that order either

GLD: I understand where you are coming from. Your cancelation request is already with my team. I can assure you that I will notify you the minute I hear back from them about it. I appreciate your patience and understanding.

Thank you. I'm not trying to be problematic, but all of mymother orders are shipping within a day, which is phenomenal. This one chain seems to be impossible to get. I'll just order another length and design once it's refunded.

GLD: You're welcome and you're not being problematic. No worries at all. Since this has been forwarded to our team, rest assured that it will be taken care of. In the meantime, is there anything that I can assist you with while waiting for an update?
Nothing else
GLD: No worries! Have a good day!
